actionable_feedback: Add an explicit remediation recommendation table in axi_assertion_gap_report.md listing the chosen remediation option(s) (IDs), per-option costs, total combined cost, and percent of remediation_budget_usd used.

Provide a short justification that the chosen set is the 'smallest sufficient' remedial action: either prove sufficiency against an acceptance threshold or document the acceptance criteria used to decide single-option vs. combo.
If multiple combos were considered, include a compact combos table showing each combo, combined cost, combined reduction_pct, and feasibility (cost <= remediation_budget_usd).

Ensure the remediation choice and cost math are visible and traceable in both the report and the counterexample_table.csv (e.g., add a column for recommended_action or chosen_option_flag and a separate costs CSV or appended rows).

Resolve the truncated-preview risk by ensuring the report file contains the full remediation discussion (no truncated sections) and regenerate artifacts so the grader/verifier can review the full text.

Document any packet-local proxies or assumptions used to replace missing weights/thresholds and, if possible, add recommended acceptance thresholds or a short sensitivity/robustness argument showing remediation choice stability under reasonable threshold variations.
artifact_specific_comments: {'artifact_ref': 'attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]', 'comment': 'Report documents assumptions, derived metrics, and sensitivity checks but stops (preview truncated) before showing an auditable remediation selection and combined-cost justification. Add remediation recommendation table and acceptance criteria.'}

{'artifact_ref': 'attempts/baseline/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]', 'comment': 'CSV contains per-record metrics and sensitivity columns. Add fields or a companion CSV summarizing remediation assignment (chosen options) and per-option cost attribution to records if remediation is record-targeted.'}
feedback_summary: Artifacts are present, calculations (burst_bytes, priority_proxy) and +5% sensitivity analysis are reproducible and documented. Partial credit deducted because the submission did not include an explicit, auditable remediation recommendation (selected option(s), combined cost, percent-of-budget check, and justification of 'smallest sufficient' or acceptance criteria). The report preview was truncated which reduced grader confidence in remediation selection claims.

extra_model_fields.notes: Actionable changes focus on adding an auditable remediation recommendation and removing truncation to allow semantic graders to validate the selection and cost math.
recommended_reviewer: principal investigator with AXI/formal verification experience

verifier_issues.message: Report preview is truncated; grader inferred remediation selection from preview and trace which reduces confidence in remediation claims.
Deterministic precheck (1.0) differs from model semantic score (0.8); deterministic check validated artifact presence only.
